title: Linear-Time String Search and Prefix Structure
description: Scan large logs for many repeated patterns without repeated restart work. Learners cumulatively produce a verified prefix-based matching engine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Compute prefix-function fallback lengths while preserving matched-prefix meaning.
Use prefix evidence to avoid rechecking characters in Knuth-Morris-Pratt search.
Use rolling hashes with explicit modulus, collision verification, and numeric limits.
